brief.audience: healthcare providers and administrators responsible for appointment scheduling
brief.coreMessage: AI voice agents streamline appointment scheduling in healthcare

headlines: Streamline healthcare scheduling with AI voice agents
Reduce staff workload with Telnyx Voice AI appointment system
Manage high call volumes in 140+ countries with one platform
Sub-200ms latency AI voice agents for healthcare scheduling
HIPAA-compliant AI voice scheduling on Telnyx’s own network
One platform, zero extra hops for healthcare appointment calls
Telnyx Voice AI cuts scheduling time for healthcare providers
Secure, compliant AI voice agents for healthcare administrators
Optimize appointment scheduling with Telnyx’s global network
AI-powered voice scheduling on a single, integrated platform
descriptions: Telnyx Voice AI uses a single platform with a proprietary network to handle appointment scheduling across 140+ countries, reducing call latency below 200ms.
Our HIPAA, SOC2, and PCI compliant infrastructure processes appointment calls without extra network hops, decreasing staff time spent on scheduling tasks.
Telnyx Voice AI addresses high call volumes by co-locating AI inference with telephony on an owned network, ensuring fast and secure healthcare appointment management.
Replace multiple vendors with Telnyx’s one platform solution that supports global healthcare scheduling with low latency and full compliance.
Leverage Telnyx’s infrastructure to automate appointment scheduling, minimizing inefficiencies and supporting administrators with scalable AI voice agents.
